name: global_safety_policy
description: Cross-domain safety rules applied to every action.

rules.description: Content tries to override instructions or exfiltrate data.
rules.reason: Possible prompt injection detected; the proposed action is blocked

rules.description: Destructive action that cannot be undone.
rules.reason: Irreversible destructive action requires human approval

rules.description: Planner is unsure about an externally-impactful action.
rules.reason: Low planner confidence on an impactful action; routing to approval

rules.description: Message asks a user for credentials (phishing).
rules.reason: Action requests credentials from a user (phishing pattern); blocked
